title: Iron Chests redesign
description: Changes upgraded chests colors to match corresponding material type better.
body:
This is a resource pack for the _Iron Chests_ mod made by **ProgWML6**. It changes upgraded chest textures to be more consistent with corresponding material colors.

Below, the comparison:
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52b206d34b98c25650336496b339b30e53d12604.png)
